project_id.description: The ID of the Project the Timecard Entry belongs to

date.description: The Date of the Timecard Entry

hours.description: The Hours of the Timecard Entry

lunch_time.description: Duration of lunch break in minutes for the Timecard Entry. Only required if Timesheet time entry is configured for Start Time and Stop Time.

time_in.description: The Start Time of the Timecard Entry in ISO 8601 format. Only required if Timesheet time entry is configured for Start Time and Stop Time.

time_out.description: The Stop Time of the Timecard Entry in ISO 8601 format. Only required if Timesheet time entry is configured for Start Time and Stop Time.

billable.description: The Billable status of the Timecard Entry

description.description: The Description of the Timecard Entry

timecard_time_type_id.description: The ID of the Timecard Time Type of the Timecard Entry

location_id.description: The ID of the Location of the Timecard Entry

cost_code_id.description: The ID of the Cost Code of the Timecard Entry

set_timecard_time_type_automatically.description: Whether or not to allow the automatic overtime management system to apply the configured rules to set the timecard_time_type_id and/or split the timecard entry automatically

sub_job_id.description: The ID of the Sub Job of the Timecard Entry

party_id.description: The ID of the Party of the Timecard Entry

crew_id.description: The ID of the Crew of the Timecard Entry

procore_signature_id.description: The ID of the Procore Signature of the Timecard Entry

timesheet_id.description: The ID of the Timesheet of the Timecard Entry

clock_in_id.description: The ID of the clock in Gps Position of the Timecard Entry

clock_out_id.description: The ID of the clock out Gps Position of the Timecard Entry

clock_in_time.description: The datetime a timecard clock in was punched

clock_out_time.description: The datetime a timecard clock out was punched

approval_status.description: The Approval Status of the Timecard Entry

line_item_type_id.description: The ID of the Line Item Type of the Timecard Entry
